data.title: Polaris Inc. beats 4th-quarter earnings, with sales of $1.922 billion (+9% YoY), reports cautious outlook for 2025.
data.description: Polaris Inc. (NYSE: PII) exceeded expectations in its fourth-quarter earnings report, with adjusted earnings per share coming in at 8 cents, surpassing the estimated 6 cents. The company saw a 9% year-over-year increase in quarterly sales, reaching $1.922 billion, higher than the expected $1.807 billion. This growth was driven by increased shipment volumes to meet rising demand. However, the company remains cautious about the upcoming year, citing potential pressure on margins and a softer earnings projection. In the fourth quarter of 2025, Polaris reported $288 million in impairment and other charges, mainly noncash, due to the classification of the Indian Motorcycle business as held for sale. There was also an additional $54 million in noncash intangible-asset impairment.

data.title: Boralex to reveal Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 27, 11 a.m. (TSX: BLX) Montreal.
data.description: Montreal-based renewable energy company, Boralex inc. (TSX: BLX), has scheduled the unveiling of its fourth quarter financial results for 2025 on Friday, February 27, 2026, at 11 a.m. Investors and stakeholders can expect critical updates on the company's performance during this period.

data.title: February is AMD and Low Vision Month at Prevent Blindness, offering free resources like videos and fact sheets. Chicago, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: Prevent Blindness is providing complimentary educational materials on Age-Related Macular Degeneration (AMD) and low vision, such as patient and expert videos, webpages, and fact sheets. This initiative was announced in Chicago on January 27, 2026. Prevent Blindness, a prominent patient advocacy group in the United States, aims to raise awareness and offer support for individuals dealing with vision impairment. The resources cover a wide range of topics related to AMD and low vision, benefiting patients, caregivers, and healthcare professionals.

data.title: Challenger Center honors Challenger crew on 40th anniversary, inspiring next gen explorers. Launch in 2026.
data.description: Challenger Center is marking the upcoming 40th anniversary of the tragic loss of the Challenger STS-51L crew on January 28, 1986. The commemoration will span throughout 2026, with various events planned by the organization and its network of affiliates. The initiative aims to honor the memory of the crew and their mission, raising awareness about STEM education.

data.title: AmberSemi completes silicon tape-out for PowerTile™ vertical power solution for AI data centers in Dublin, CA on Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: A significant breakthrough symbolizes a revolutionary change in power distribution for upcoming AI Processors. Amber Semiconductor, Inc. (AmberSemi™), based in Dublin, California, announced on Jan. 27, 2026, their groundbreaking achievement. The company, known for spearheading innovative power management solutions for data centers, reached a major milestone in their mission. This advancement is expected to have a notable impact on the industry, setting a new standard.

data.title: Adecco buys Advantis Medical Staffing in U.S to strengthen healthcare staffing; expands tech capabilities.
data.description: Adecco, a prominent global workforce solutions provider, has recently expanded its tech-enabled healthcare staffing capabilities in the U.S. On January 27, 2026, Adecco confirmed the acquisition of Advantis Medical Staffing, a U.S.-based company specializing in healthcare staffing. This move signifies a strategic investment in the healthcare sector to enhance Adecco's service offerings. The acquisition aims to strengthen their market presence in the U.S. and position them as a formidable player in the healthcare staffing industry. With this acquisition, Adecco gains access to Advantis Medical Staffing's networks and expertise, enabling them to tap into new opportunities and broaden their scope in the healthcare staffing market. This strategic decision underscores Adecco's commitment to innovation and growth in the evolving healthcare industry.

data.title: Tredence partners with Snowflake to accelerate AI-driven energy operations, aiming to provide AI-driven insights at scale.
data.description: Tredence, a renowned data science and AI solutions provider, has partnered with Snowflake to offer comprehensive AI-driven intelligence to energy companies. This collaboration aims to facilitate the rapid modernization of these organizations and empower them to leverage AI insights on a large scale. The partnership announcement was made in San Jose, California, on January 27, 2026. This collaboration marks a significant step towards enabling energy firms to harness the benefits of advanced technologies for enhanced operational efficiency and decision-making.

data.title: ARC introduces orders-based reporting and settlement system in Jan 27, 2026, aiming to revolutionize airline retailing.
data.description: A significant advancement in the air travel industry was announced today in Arlington, Virginia, as the Airlines Reporting Corporation (ARC) introduced a groundbreaking orders-based reporting and settlement system on January 27, 2026. This system represents a major departure from traditional ticket-based methods, aiming to provide greater efficiency and empowerment to airlines and travel companies.

data.title: iXAfrica Data Centres partners with Oracle for Kenya's first public cloud region in Nairobi, meeting strong demand for OCI services. President William Ruto announced in January 2024. Largest hyperscale facility in East and Central Africa.
data.description: Nairobi, Kenya - iXAfrica Data Centre Limited (iXAfrica), the largest hyperscale, carrier-neutral, AI-ready facility in East and Central Africa, has partnered with Oracle to host the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) region in Nairobi, Kenya. This collaboration, announced by H.E. President William Ruto in January 2024, aims to address the growing demand for OCI services in the country. The new public cloud region will be hosted by iXAfrica, solidifying its position as a key player in the region's cloud infrastructure market.

data.title: TimberTech launches "The Future of Decking" campaign, marking a new chapter for the brand, targeting digital and social media.
data.description: In Chicago, TimberTech®, the leading brand in premium composite and PVC decking and railing solutions, part of the James Hardie exterior products portfolio, revealed their latest marketing campaign, "The Future of Decking." The campaign, created by James Hardie's in-house creative team, will launch across various digital and social media channels, streaming TV, and specific print publications. This initiative signifies a significant step forward for the brand as it aims to solidify its position as the top brand in the industry.

data.title: Netherlands construction industry projected to grow at 2.7% AAGR from 2026-2029 due to investments in manufacturing facilities, transport infrastructure, and offshore wind energy.
data.description: A recent report titled "The Netherlands Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. The construction industry in the Netherlands is projected to grow by 1.7% in 2025. This growth is attributed to rising investor confidence and investments in infrastructure, including road and rail projects. The report provides insights into various sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, analyzing trends and forecasts up to 2029.

data.title: MyNetDiary introduces Premium Plus tier with AI Coach and new tools to its 4.7-star calorie tracking app trusted by millions.
data.description: A highly-rated calorie tracking app, utilized by millions of users, based in Boca Raton, Florida, has introduced a new subscription service on January 27, 2026. MyNetDiary, which has garnered an impressive 4.7-star rating, has been aiding individuals in nutrition tracking and weight management since 2008. The latest subscription includes conversational coaching and innovative smart features, enhancing the app's functionality for users.

data.title: BD sets record date for spin-off of biosciences & diagnostic solutions business on Feb 9, 2026 in merger with Waters Corp.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) disclosed that the distribution date and closing date for the spin-off and merger with Waters Corporation have been scheduled for February 9, 2026. The company's Board of Directors confirmed this decision. BD, listed on the NYSE as BDX, shared this information from its headquarters in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey.

data.title: Waters shareholders approved merging with BD's Biosciences & Diagnostic Solutions Business. Q4 2025 financial call on Feb 9.
data.description: Waters Corporation will host its Q4 2025 Financial Results Conference Call on Monday, February 9th, 2026, at 8:30am ET. This call aligns with the anticipated completion of the transaction. The event will take place in MILFORD, Mass., on January 27, 2026. Waters Corporation, listed as WAT on the NYSE, will be leading the conference call.

data.title: Bybit, Mantle, and Byreal collaborate to launch Mantle Super Portal, expanding $MNT to Solana for improved CeDeFi access.
data.description: Today in Dubai, UAE, three major companies, Bybit, Mantle, and Byreal, revealed the introduction of Mantle Super Portal. This innovative platform, developed by Mantle, enables smooth capital transfers between ecosystems by extending $MNT to Solana. This integration is set to enhance CeDeFi capabilities and provide users with greater accessibility to decentralized finance options.

data.title: INmune Bio Inc outlines 2025 milestones and 2026 initiatives in shareholder letter from CEO Moss.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, on January 27, 2026, INmune Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: INMB), a company specializing in inflammation and immunology at the clinical stage, shared a letter with investors from CEO David Moss.

US natural gas futures extend losses, prices down by 10% as output slowly returns and demand declines in the central part of the country, now that the worst of the Arctic storm has moved into the northeast region.

data.title: BD will announce Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 9, 2026. Webcast scheduled at 8am ET.
data.description: In Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, on January 27, 2026, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a prominent global medical technology firm, revealed plans to conduct an audio webcast at 8 a.m. ET on Monday, February 9, 2026. This webcast, led by BD management, aims to delve into the company's financial performance. BD, which is listed on the NYSE as BDX, stands out as a leader in the medical technology sector. The discussion in the webcast is expected to address key financial figures and strategic insights.
